parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.1, maxOutputTokens: 2000 } }) }}

parameters.subject: Welcome to Apex Accounting — Next Steps
parameters.message:
=

Welcome to Apex Accounting

Dear {{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.contact_name }},

Thank you for choosing Apex Accounting. We've received your onboarding form and our team is reviewing your information.

What Happens Next

1Our team will review your submitted documents within 24 hours
2You'll receive a service agreement for the requested services
3Your dedicated accountant will reach out to schedule an intro call

Your Details

Company{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.business_name }}
Business Type{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.business_type }}
Services{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.services_requested.join(', ') }}
Est. Monthly Fee{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.estimated_monthly_fee }}

If you have any questions, reply to this email or call us at (214) 555-0800.

Best regards,
Apex Accounting Team

parameters.subject: {{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.contact_email }}
parameters.message:
=

Company{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.company_name }}
Statement Type{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.statement_type }}

Key Figures

Total Revenue {{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.total_revenue }}
Total Expenses {{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.total_expenses }}

parameters.subject: =Invoice Needs Approval — {{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.vendor_name }} — {{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.total_due }}
parameters.message:
=

🧾 Invoice Needs Approval

Vendor{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.vendor_name }}
Invoice #{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.invoice_number }}
Due Date{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.due_date }}
Payment Terms{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.payment_terms }}

Line Items

{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.line_items.map(item => '').join('') }}
Item Amount
' + item.description + '' + (item.amount || item.unit_price) + '
Subtotal:{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.subtotal }}
Tax:{{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.tax_amount }}
Total Due: {{ $('Switch').item.json.extractedData.total_due }}
⚠️ Action Required: Please review and approve this invoice.

parameters.subject: =Manual Review Needed — Unclassified Document
parameters.message:
=

⚠️ Document Needs Manual Review

The AI system received a document it couldn't confidently classify.

Classification Attempt:{{ $json.documentType }}
Confidence Score:{{ $json.confidence }}
Processed At:{{ $json.processedAt }}
Action Required: Please check the original email, classify the document manually, and process it accordingly.

parameters.subject: =Unsupported File Received
parameters.message:
=

📎 Unsupported File Type

An email was received with a non-PDF attachment. The AI system only processes PDF files.

Please check the original email and process manually if needed.
